benefits.description: Interested in using for weight loss during cut, concerned about fat distribution on thighs, upper body and midsection despite caloric deficit

protocol_notes: OP states 23% body fat (via BIA scan, uncertain accuracy), previously around 20% BF. Recently gained weight despite being in caloric deficit. On birth control (for accutane). Inquiring about short-term Retatrutide use for cut.
